programmes.show_name: The Essay: The Lives of Hildegard of Bingen
programmes.show_description: 2/5. Medieval composer and polymath Hildegard of Bingen remembers her life as an anchoress. A fictionalised account, written by Anna Linstrum and performed by Juliet Stevenson.
